emails.subject: CMS Deal Booked
emails.body: CMS Deal Booked Louise, further to our meeting last week, the contracts have been executed and the Rockies transportation has been sold to CMS. Origination and trading participated in the P&L. Orig $ 1,045,000. Trading approx $310,000. We are a little closer to our Q3 targets of 2MM in sept. Please call if there are any questions. BT

emails.subject: RE: CMS Deal Booked
emails.body: RE: CMS Deal Booked Good job. I bet you never thought you would retrade the transport this much. To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: RE: CMS Deal Booked
emails.body: Never did... but glad we were here to ensure it was captured. BT To: Tycholiz, Barry
